_comment: v2.0: 每个 skill 新增 layer（L0-L3）、roles（允许触发的角色）、ai_usage（在AI工程里怎么用）、non_ai_boundaries（不能覆盖什么）。推断约束在第二阶段收口，本版先补齐表达能力。

layer_rubric.L0: 具体工具或语言实现（如 TypeScript、pgvector）
layer_rubric.L1: 通用工程能力（如 API 设计、错误处理）
layer_rubric.L2: AI 应用能力（如 Prompt 设计、结构化输出）
layer_rubric.L3: AI 系统控制能力（如 Agent 编排、评估体系）

role.label: 前端工程师 → AI Engineer（应用向）

level_rubric.3: 能在真实项目交付并排障
level_rubric.4: 能设计系统、优化与治理

level_rubric_en.3: Can ship & debug in real projects

skills.name: API 设计与契约
ai_usage: 定义 LLM 服务的输入输出结构与错误码
设计 AI 功能与上下游系统的集成契约
约束流式响应的接口规范
ai_usage_en: Define input/output structures and error codes for LLM services
Design integration contracts between AI features and upstream/downstream systems
Specify interface standards for streaming responses
non_ai_boundaries: 不等于 Prompt 设计或指令工程
不包含 Function Calling 的工具选择控制权
不涉及模型选型或 token 计费
non_ai_boundaries_en: Does not cover prompt design or instruction engineering
Does not include tool-selection control in Function Calling
Does not involve model selection or token billing

skills.name: 鉴权与安全基线
ai_usage: 调用 LLM API 时管理 API Key 与速率限制
保护 AI 服务端点，防止未授权访问与滥用
ai_usage_en: Manage API keys and rate limits when calling LLM APIs
Secure AI service endpoints against unauthorized access and abuse
non_ai_boundaries: 不等于部署到某平台（如 Vercel）就具备鉴权能力
不涵盖模型层面的内容安全过滤
non_ai_boundaries_en: Deploying to a platform (e.g. Vercel) does not imply having this skill
Does not cover model-level content safety filtering

skills.name: 错误处理与重试
ai_usage: 处理 LLM API 超时、限流、返回格式异常
设计 AI 调用的指数退避重试与降级策略
ai_usage_en: Handle LLM API timeouts, rate limiting, and malformed responses
Design exponential-backoff retries and fallback strategies for AI calls
non_ai_boundaries: 不等于 AI 输出质量保障（幻觉、漂移属于评估域）
不包含模型级别的 fallback（如切换模型）
non_ai_boundaries_en: Does not cover AI output quality assurance (hallucination/drift belongs to eval domain)
Does not include model-level fallback (e.g. switching models)

skills.name: 可观测性（日志/指标/trace）
ai_usage: 追踪 LLM 调用链路（latency、token 消耗、错误率）
排查 AI 功能的线上问题（幻觉、上下文截断、工具调用失败）
构建 AI 服务的监控看板
ai_usage_en: Trace LLM call chains (latency, token usage, error rates)
Debug production AI issues (hallucinations, context truncation, tool call failures)
Build monitoring dashboards for AI services
non_ai_boundaries: 排障直觉可迁移，但 AI 的 bug 没有报错堆栈——幻觉是'正确格式的错误答案'
不等于 AI 质量评估（质量指标是单独能力域）
non_ai_boundaries_en: Debugging instinct transfers, but AI bugs have no error stack — hallucinations are 'correctly formatted wrong answers'
Does not equal AI quality evaluation (quality metrics is a separate skill domain)

skills.name: 部署与 CI/CD
ai_usage: 把 AI 应用容器化并部署到云环境
管理模型版本与服务滚动更新
在 CI 中集成 AI 功能的冒烟测试
ai_usage_en: Containerize and deploy AI applications to cloud environments
Manage model versions and rolling service updates
Integrate AI feature smoke tests into CI pipelines
non_ai_boundaries: 不等于模型训练或微调的基础设施
不涵盖 GPU 集群调度与分布式训练
non_ai_boundaries_en: Does not cover infrastructure for model training or fine-tuning
Does not include GPU cluster scheduling or distributed training

skills.name: TypeScript 工程化
ai_usage: 为 AI 工具调用定义类型安全的参数和返回结构
在前端集成 AI 功能时保证类型推断和代码健壮性
ai_usage_en: Define type-safe parameters and return structures for AI tool calls
Ensure type inference and code robustness when integrating AI features in frontend
non_ai_boundaries: 仅适用于前端/全栈工程师；Java/Go/Python 后端工程师不涉及此项
TypeScript 工程化能力来自日常开发实践，不能从'独立交付功能'直接推断
non_ai_boundaries_en: Only applicable to frontend/fullstack engineers; Java/Go/Python backend engineers do not have this
TypeScript proficiency comes from daily practice, not inferred from shipping a feature alone

skills.name: 文本清洗与预处理
ai_usage: 把原始文档（PDF/HTML/Word）转换成 AI 可消费的纯文本
去除噪声（页眉页脚/乱码/特殊字符），标准化编码
为 RAG 管道准备高质量输入
ai_usage_en: Convert raw documents (PDF/HTML/Word) into clean text for AI consumption
Remove noise (headers/footers/encoding artifacts/special characters)
Prepare high-quality inputs for RAG pipelines
non_ai_boundaries: CSV/Excel 格式转换有迁移价值，但 RAG 的文本清洗面对的是非结构化自然语言，难度更高
不等于文档语义切分（chunking 是独立技能）
non_ai_boundaries_en: CSV/Excel parsing transfers partially, but RAG text cleaning deals with unstructured natural language — harder
Does not equal document semantic chunking (chunking is a separate skill)

skills.name: 文档切分（chunking）
ai_usage: 把长文档按语义边界切成合适的块，保证检索颗粒度
调整 chunk_size 与 overlap，平衡召回率与上下文完整性
ai_usage_en: Split long documents into semantically coherent chunks at the right granularity
Tune chunk_size and overlap to balance recall and context completeness
non_ai_boundaries: 数据库表结构设计≠文本语义切分——前者是关系型存储，后者是语义完整性判断
不等于文本清洗（清洗是切分的前置步骤）
non_ai_boundaries_en: Database schema design ≠ text semantic chunking — one is relational storage, the other is semantic boundary judgment
Does not equal text cleaning (cleaning is a prerequisite step)

skills.name: 向量化与 embedding 选型
ai_usage: 选择合适的 embedding 模型（OpenAI/BGE/Cohere 等）
把文本块转换成向量表示，存入向量数据库
评估不同 embedding 模型对召回质量的影响
ai_usage_en: Select appropriate embedding models (OpenAI/BGE/Cohere etc.)
Convert text chunks into vector representations for storage
Evaluate how different embedding models affect retrieval quality
non_ai_boundaries: 前端 store 结构设计或数据库建模不能直接推断此能力——embedding 选型是 ML 领域决策
不等于训练或微调 embedding 模型
non_ai_boundaries_en: Frontend store design or database modeling does not transfer to this — embedding selection is an ML domain decision
Does not cover training or fine-tuning embedding models

skills.name: 向量检索（pgvector/HNSW）
ai_usage: 用 pgvector/HNSW 实现高效的近似最近邻检索
调优索引参数（ef/m）平衡召回率与查询延迟
在 RAG 管道中作为检索底座
ai_usage_en: Implement efficient approximate nearest-neighbor search with pgvector/HNSW
Tune index parameters (ef/m) to balance recall and query latency
Serve as the retrieval backbone in RAG pipelines
non_ai_boundaries: 跨组件状态同步≠向量检索——两者毫无关系
跑通 demo（如 faiss 示例）≠ 生产级索引调优
non_ai_boundaries_en: Cross-component state sync ≠ vector search — these are unrelated
Running a demo (e.g. faiss example) ≠ production-grade index tuning

skills.name: 召回与重排（rerank）
ai_usage: 实现两段式检索：粗召回（向量）+ 精排（reranker 模型）
用 BM25/混合检索提升召回率
根据召回率/MRR 指标迭代检索管道
ai_usage_en: Implement two-stage retrieval: coarse recall (vector) + fine reranking (reranker model)
Use BM25/hybrid search to improve recall
Iterate on the retrieval pipeline based on recall/MRR metrics
non_ai_boundaries: 数据库查询优化（索引/执行计划）不等于向量召回重排——底层机制完全不同
不等于精调 reranker 模型
non_ai_boundaries_en: Database query optimization (indexes/execution plans) ≠ vector reranking — fundamentally different mechanisms
Does not cover fine-tuning reranker models

skills.name: 数据质量与去重
ai_usage: 检测并去除重复文档，避免检索偏置
评估知识库数据质量，建立数据准入标准
ai_usage_en: Detect and remove duplicate documents to prevent retrieval bias
Assess knowledge base data quality and establish ingestion standards
non_ai_boundaries: 不等于 AI 输出质量评估（那是 eval 域的技能）
不涵盖数据标注与人工评审流程
non_ai_boundaries_en: Does not equal AI output quality evaluation (that belongs to the eval domain)
Does not cover data annotation and human review workflows

skills.name: Prompt 结构设计
ai_usage: 设计 system/user/assistant 多角色指令结构
用 few-shot 示例引导模型输出预期格式
通过迭代测试稳定 prompt 在不同输入下的表现
ai_usage_en: Design system/user/assistant multi-role instruction structures
Use few-shot examples to guide model toward expected output formats
Stabilize prompt behavior across varied inputs through iterative testing
non_ai_boundaries: 日常用 ChatGPT 写代码≠工程化 Prompt——前者是使用，后者是设计可复用、可测试的指令系统
不等于 Function Calling 的工具描述设计
non_ai_boundaries_en: Using ChatGPT to write code ≠ engineering prompts — one is usage, the other is designing reusable, testable instruction systems
Does not equal tool description design for Function Calling

skills.name: 结构化输出 / JSON schema 约束
ai_usage: 用 JSON mode / response_format 强制模型输出结构化数据
定义 JSON schema 约束模型输出字段类型与范围
对模型返回做 schema 校验与容错解析
ai_usage_en: Use JSON mode / response_format to enforce structured model output
Define JSON schema to constrain output field types and ranges
Validate and fault-tolerantly parse model responses against schema
non_ai_boundaries: 注意：你过去做的是接收端校验（请求参数/表单），AI 场景是生成端约束（控制模型输出）——方向相反，但底层'定义数据形状'的逻辑相通
不等于 Prompt 结构设计（二者是不同但互补的能力）
non_ai_boundaries_en: Note: your existing experience is receiving-end validation (request params/forms); AI structured output is generation-end constraint (controlling model output) — opposite direction, but the underlying 'define data shape' logic transfers
Does not equal prompt structure design (they are different but complementary skills)

skills.name: 函数 / 工具调用
ai_usage: 定义工具描述（function schema），让模型决定何时调用哪个工具
解析模型返回的 tool_call 参数并执行对应函数
处理工具调用失败后的重试与回退
ai_usage_en: Define tool descriptions (function schema) so the model decides when and which tool to call
Parse tool_call parameters returned by the model and execute the corresponding function
Handle retries and fallbacks when tool calls fail
non_ai_boundaries: 调用外部 API（你控制何时调用）≠ Function Calling（模型决定调用）——控制权完全不同
不等于多工具编排（那是更复杂的 Agent 层能力）
non_ai_boundaries_en: Calling external APIs (you decide when to call) ≠ Function Calling (the model decides) — fundamentally different control flow
Does not equal multi-tool orchestration (that is a more complex Agent-layer skill)

skills.name: 多工具编排
ai_usage: 在 Agent 循环中串联多个工具（搜索、计算、代码执行等）
处理工具调用的并行与顺序依赖
管理工具失败时的整体任务恢复
ai_usage_en: Chain multiple tools (search, compute, code execution) within an Agent loop
Handle parallel and sequential dependencies between tool calls
Manage overall task recovery when individual tools fail
non_ai_boundaries: 多步表单（确定性状态机）≠ 多工具 Agent（非确定性，模型动态决策）
不等于 Function Calling——后者是单工具调用，多工具编排是在此之上的协调层
non_ai_boundaries_en: Multi-step forms (deterministic state machine) ≠ multi-tool Agent (non-deterministic, model decides dynamically)
Does not equal Function Calling — that is single-tool invocation; this is the coordination layer above it

skills.name: Agent 状态与记忆
ai_usage: 管理多轮对话的上下文历史与记忆压缩
设计 Agent 的短期（in-context）与长期（外部存储）记忆架构
处理上下文窗口溢出与历史截断策略
ai_usage_en: Manage multi-turn conversation history and memory compression
Design Agent short-term (in-context) and long-term (external storage) memory architecture
Handle context window overflow and history truncation strategies
non_ai_boundaries: 确定性状态机（步骤 1/2/3）≠ Agent 非确定性对话状态——复杂度不是同一量级
不等于向量检索——虽然长期记忆可能用向量存储实现，但两者是不同层的能力
non_ai_boundaries_en: Deterministic state machines (step 1/2/3) ≠ Agent non-deterministic conversation state — different orders of complexity
Does not equal vector search — though long-term memory may use vector storage, they are different-layer skills

skills.name: 成本与延迟优化
ai_usage: 控制 token 消耗（prompt 压缩、输出长度限制）
选择性价比最优的模型（GPT-4o vs GPT-4o-mini vs 开源模型）
用语义缓存减少重复 LLM 调用，降低成本
ai_usage_en: Control token consumption (prompt compression, output length limits)
Select the most cost-effective model (GPT-4o vs GPT-4o-mini vs open-source)
Use semantic caching to reduce redundant LLM calls and lower costs
non_ai_boundaries: 前端首屏优化/后端接口 RT 优化的思路可迁移，但 LLM 的计费模型（按 token）与传统性能优化手段差异大
不等于模型压缩或量化（那是 MLOps 领域）
non_ai_boundaries_en: Frontend FCP optimization / backend RT optimization mindset transfers partially, but LLM billing (per token) differs significantly from traditional performance tuning
Does not cover model compression or quantization (that is MLOps territory)

skills.name: 流式输出与前端集成
ai_usage: 用 SSE/fetch streaming 实现 LLM 流式响应的前端渲染
处理 delta token 的边收边渲染与 buffer 管理
实现断流重连与错误恢复
ai_usage_en: Use SSE/fetch streaming to render LLM streaming responses in the frontend
Handle delta token accumulation, incremental rendering, and buffer management
Implement reconnection on stream failure and error recovery
non_ai_boundaries: 简单 WebSocket 消息推送（一次推完）≠ AI 流式输出（一个 token 一个 token 地处理）
经验可迁移，但 AI 流式还有 buffer 管理、think 标签解析、渲染性能等额外挑战
non_ai_boundaries_en: Simple WebSocket push (send all at once) ≠ AI streaming (token by token processing)
Experience transfers partially, but AI streaming adds buffer management, think-tag parsing, and rendering performance challenges

skills.name: 离线评估集构建
ai_usage: 构建问答对（query-answer）黄金评测集
设计评估维度（准确率/相关性/完整性）
用评测集驱动 RAG 管道的迭代优化
ai_usage_en: Build golden eval sets of query-answer pairs
Design evaluation dimensions (accuracy/relevance/completeness)
Use eval sets to drive iterative optimization of RAG pipelines
non_ai_boundaries: 传统单元测试（断言确定输出）→ AI 评估（判断不确定输出的质量）：思维模式相通，但方法论完全不同
不等于在线反馈采集（那是生产环境的用户信号）
non_ai_boundaries_en: Traditional unit tests (assert deterministic output) → AI evaluation (judge quality of non-deterministic output): same mindset, completely different methodology
Does not equal online feedback collection (that is user signals in production)

skills.name: 在线反馈采集
ai_usage: 设计用户反馈收集机制（点赞/踩、引用率、会话重启率）
把用户行为信号转化为 AI 质量指标
用在线信号驱动 prompt 或检索管道的持续优化
ai_usage_en: Design user feedback collection (thumbs up/down, citation rate, session restart rate)
Convert user behavior signals into AI quality metrics
Use online signals to drive continuous improvement of prompts or retrieval pipelines
non_ai_boundaries: 埋点/统计分析的思路可迁移，但 AI 在线反馈需要与模型迭代闭环——不是单纯看数据
不等于 A/B 实验（在线反馈是观测，A/B 是干预）
non_ai_boundaries_en: Analytics/tracking mindset transfers, but AI online feedback needs to close the loop with model iteration — not just dashboards
Does not equal A/B testing (online feedback is observation; A/B is intervention)

skills.name: A/B 实验
ai_usage: 对比不同 prompt 版本或检索策略的效果
设计实验分组与统计显著性检验
用实验结果决策模型或策略升级
ai_usage_en: Compare the effectiveness of different prompt versions or retrieval strategies
Design experiment groups and statistical significance tests
Use experiment results to decide model or strategy upgrades
non_ai_boundaries: AI 的 A/B 实验复杂度远高于前端按钮颜色测试——输出非确定性，对照组难以严格控制
不等于在线反馈采集（A/B 是主动干预，在线反馈是被动观测）
non_ai_boundaries_en: AI A/B testing is far more complex than frontend button color tests — non-deterministic outputs make control groups hard to isolate
Does not equal online feedback collection (A/B is active intervention; online feedback is passive observation)

skills.name: 质量指标（准确/覆盖/幻觉率）
ai_usage: 定义并计算 RAG 系统的核心指标（Precision@K/Recall/MRR）
检测幻觉率与事实漂移
建立质量基线，追踪模型或数据变更后的指标变化
ai_usage_en: Define and compute core RAG metrics (Precision@K / Recall / MRR)
Detect hallucination rates and factual drift
Establish quality baselines and track metric changes after model or data updates
non_ai_boundaries: 传统排障工具链（DevTools/日志/堆栈）对 AI 幻觉几乎全部失效——没有报错，只有'正确格式的错误答案'
不等于可观测性（可观测性是系统行为，质量指标是输出内容）
non_ai_boundaries_en: Traditional debugging tools (DevTools/logs/stack traces) are nearly useless for AI hallucinations — no errors, just 'correctly formatted wrong answers'
Does not equal observability (observability is about system behavior; quality metrics are about output content)

orientations.label: 通用 AI 应用
orientations.description: 不确定方向？选这个。覆盖 AI 应用开发的全部基础能力，数据、模型、评估都均衡涉及。
orientations.description_en: Not sure where to focus? Start here. Covers the all-round fundamentals of AI app development — data, models, and evaluation in balance.

orientations.label: 智能问答 / 知识库
orientations.description: 想做能查资料、答问题的 AI（如企业知识库问答、文档助手）。重点练「让 AI 准确找到并用对资料」的检索能力。
orientations.description_en: Build AI that searches and answers from your own documents (knowledge-base Q&A, doc assistants). Focuses on retrieval — helping the AI find and use the right information accurately.

orientations.label: Agent / 工具编排
orientations.description: 想做能调用工具、自己决定下一步的 AI（自动化助手、多步任务 agent）。重点练让模型可靠地调用函数、编排工具、管理状态。
orientations.description_en: Build AI that calls tools and decides its own next step (automation assistants, multi-step agents). Focuses on reliable function calling, tool orchestration and state.

orientations.label: 评估与上线
orientations.description: 想把 AI 应用做稳、敢上线。重点练离线/在线评估、质量回归、可观测性，让效果可衡量、可交付。
orientations.description_en: Make your AI app reliable enough to ship. Focuses on offline/online evaluation, quality regression and observability so results are measurable.
